skill_activation_gate.purpose: SPF fires by default on every planning and development task. It is generic and applies to ALL solution modules; it is NOT industry-specific.
skill_activation_gate.if_opt_out_detected: Remain dormant: do not read rule packs and do not emit a blueprint.
skill_activation_gate.note: Stage 0 keyword/phrase gate has been removed. The skill is active by default. Opt-out is the only suppression mechanism.

domain_activation.description: After the always-on check, run semantic inference to identify which domain packs to load. Activate domain D if any trigger keyword matches OR the model judges D clearly relevant to the request. Err toward inclusion.

scoring.note: Numeric confidence scoring is replaced with deterministic domain activation: activate if keyword match OR semantic relevance. No threshold required.

high_risk_load.note: Load this ADDITIONALLY (on top of slim_core.md) when the feature is high-risk.

high_risk_criteria.description: If ANY of these apply, the request is high-risk: load instructions/common_considerations.md AND _extended packs instead of _baseline.
triggers: feature handles credentials, financial, health, or biometric data
feature involves multi-agent orchestration or autonomous tool execution
feature has admin or privileged access paths
feature is a payment, banking, insurance, or healthcare system
severity_map escalation resolves to HIGH or CRITICAL

ai_agentic.note: Load _baseline by default; load _extended only when high_risk_criteria is met.

ai_llm.note: Load _baseline by default; load _extended only when high_risk_criteria is met.

mcp.note: Load _baseline by default; load _extended only when high_risk_criteria is met.

compliance._status: DISABLED — pending org-wide implementation decision. Do not activate any compliance pack until re-enabled.

dpdp._reason: DPDPA compliance is commented out pending org-wide DPDPA implementation clarity. Re-enable when org decision is made.
dpdp.fail_safe_when_jurisdiction_unknown: DISABLED — do not activate DPDP regardless of jurisdiction.

cwe.load_when: category-specific; load the matching knowledge/cwe/<category>.md file when that weakness class is in scope

knowledge.purpose: Curated, token-efficient cheat-sheets distilled from raw sources; loaded for quick reference, not as authoritative rules.
